Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); t=d.get\('transcript',''\); print\('SUCCESS, length:', len\(t\)\); print\(t[:200] if t else json.dumps\(d\)\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://www.youtube.com/youtubei/v1/player -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'User-Agent: com.google.ios.youtube/19.29.1 \(iPhone14,3; U; CPU iOS 15_6 like Mac OS X\)' -H 'X-YouTube-Client-Name: 5' -H 'X-YouTube-Client-Version: 19.29.1' -d '{"videoId":"dQw4w9WgXcQ","context":{"client":{"clientName":"IOS","clientVersion":"19.29.1","hl":"en","gl":"US"}}}')

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); tracks=d.get\('captions',{}\).get\('playerCaptionsTracklistRenderer',{}\).get\('captionTracks',[]\); status=d.get\('playabilityStatus',{}\).get\('status'\); print\('status:', status, 'tracks:', len\(tracks\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); tracks=d.get\('captions',{}\).get\('playerCaptionsTracklistRenderer',{}\).get\('captionTracks',[]\); status=d.get\('playabilityStatus',{}\).get\('status','?'\); print\('status:', status, 'tracks:', len\(tracks\)\); [print\(t['languageCode']\) for t in tracks]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); tracks=d.get\('captions',{}\).get\('playerCaptionsTracklistRenderer',{}\).get\('captionTracks',[]\); status=d.get\('playabilityStatus',{}\).get\('status','?'\); print\('MWEB status:', status, 'tracks:', len\(tracks\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k in ['html2canvas','dom-to-image','@vercel/og','satori'] if k in deps]")
